tickets.title: Add product image gallery with zoom on hover
tickets.description: Users need a better product viewing experience. Implement an image gallery with thumbnail navigation and zoom-on-hover capability. The gallery should support multiple product images stored in constants.ts.

expected_changes.types.ts: Add 'images: string[]' field to Product interface
expected_changes.constants.ts: Add 'images' array with URLs to each product in PRODUCTS
expected_changes.App.tsx: Add image gallery component with thumbnail nav and hover zoom

comments.author: dev1@kanistore.com
comments.body: Working on this — will need to update types.ts to add 'images' array to Product interface.

comments.author: pm@kanistore.com
comments.body: Make sure zoom works on mobile too — pinch-to-zoom should be supported.

tickets.title: Fix cart item quantity update not persisting on page reload
tickets.description: BUG: When users update cart item quantities and reload the page, the changes are lost. Cart state is not being persisted to localStorage correctly. This is a critical UX issue affecting conversion rates.

expected_changes.App.tsx: Add localStorage.setItem on every cart state mutation; read on mount
expected_changes.types.ts: Verify CartItem interface includes all persisted fields

comments.author: qa@kanistore.com
comments.body: Steps to reproduce: 1) Add 3 items to cart, 2) Change quantity to 5, 3) Reload page → quantity resets to 3. Happens in Chrome and Firefox.

tickets.title: Implement AI-powered product recommendations using Gemini
tickets.description: Leverage the existing Gemini AI integration (services/geminiService.ts) to provide personalized product recommendations based on user browsing history, cart contents, and past orders. The recommendations should appear on the Home page and Product detail page.

expected_changes.types.ts: Add RecommendationResult or extend ChatMessage interface if needed
expected_changes.App.tsx: Render recommendations section on Home/Product page using service

comments.author: dev1@kanistore.com
comments.body: We can extend the existing Gemini service. Need to pass cartItems[] and order history as context. Will need new 'getRecommendations' function in geminiService.ts.

tickets.title: Admin panel: Add bulk product import via CSV
tickets.description: Admin users need to import products in bulk rather than adding them one by one. Implement a CSV upload feature in the Admin panel that parses the file and adds products to the PRODUCTS array in constants.ts (or database in future).

expected_changes.App.tsx: Add CSV file upload input + preview table in Admin panel
expected_changes.utils/csvParser.ts: Create/update CSV parser returning Product[] from raw CSV text
expected_changes.types.ts: Ensure Product interface covers all CSV columns

comments.author: dev3@kanistore.com
comments.body: PR raised at #47. CSV format: id,name,price,category,stock,description,rating. Added validation for required fields.

comments.author: qa@kanistore.com
comments.body: Reviewing now — tested with 50 products CSV, looks good. One minor issue: duplicate product IDs should be rejected.

tickets.title: Performance: Product list renders slowly with 100+ items
tickets.description: The product listing page becomes sluggish when constants.ts has more than 100 products. We need to implement virtual scrolling or pagination. Currently App.tsx renders all products without any virtualization.

expected_changes.App.tsx: Implement pagination or React virtual list for product grid
expected_changes.constants.ts: Optionally move large product list to a lazy-loaded module

tickets.title: Add order tracking with status timeline
tickets.description: Users should be able to track their orders with a visual timeline showing: Order Placed → Processing → Shipped → Delivered. Use the Order interface in types.ts.

expected_changes.types.ts: Add 'trackingEvents: TrackingEvent[]' to Order interface; add TrackingEvent type
expected_changes.constants.ts: Add trackingEvents sample data to mock orders
expected_changes.App.tsx: Render order timeline component in Orders page

comments.author: dev1@kanistore.com
comments.body: Completed and merged. Updated Order type to include 'trackingEvents' array.

tickets.title: Remove phone number field from checkout and Address interface
tickets.description: GDPR compliance: Remove the 'phone' field from the Address interface and all checkout forms. The field is collected but never used for delivery and represents unnecessary PII. Must be removed from types.ts Address interface, App.tsx checkout form, and any constants.ts mock data.

expected_changes.App.tsx: Remove phone input from checkout form; remove phone from Address object construction
expected_changes.constants.ts: Remove phone from any mock Address objects in PRODUCTS or orders

comments.author: privacy@kanistore.com
comments.body: This field is not used anywhere in the delivery pipeline. Removing it reduces GDPR surface area. Make sure ALL usages are updated — a partial removal will cause TypeScript compile errors.
